---
title: "Palmer Penguins (moved)"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.callout-important}
This page has moved. The full **Palmer Penguins** data card (including course teaching slices) lives in the [Data catalog](data/index.qmd):

**[Open Palmer Penguins data card](data/cards/palmer-penguins.qmd)**
:::

All dataset documentation is now in **[Datasets and data cards](data/index.qmd)**.
